release_notes: V14.44 build 220 beta standardises the main glucose-number typography across all seven display layouts. Each main glucose screen now targets the same large FreeSansBold scale used by Glucose + 1-Hour Live Trend. Hero, Care Action, Premium, Bedside, Clinical and Right Trend Rail layouts receive taller glucose-value regions, while automatic fit protection still reduces the scale only when longer values such as 19.9 or 99.9 require it. Unit labels, trend strips, alarm pills and widgets remain separate and readable. All Build 219 carbs/insulin layout changes, Build 217 treatment history, Build 212 native OTA safeguards and existing Nightscout, SAGE, alarm and WhatsApp functions are preserved.
